input: Hayden stepped into the sterile hall, the sharp hum of the chron-drives vibrating in his teeth. He checked the readout. Thirty-four.
Hayden stepped into the hall. He was super stressed out, literally shaking as the drives hummed. It was totally insane.

mock_llm_metrics.rationale: Uses colloquialisms 'super stressed out', 'literally shaking', 'totally insane' which violate the sci-fi noir tone.

input: Hayden stepped into the hall while the drives hummed and he looked at the readout that said thirty-four because it had dropped from thirty-seven just yesterday when he crossed the boundary.

mock_llm_metrics.rationale: Fails to match the punchy, staccato sentence rhythm of the reference.
